name: After Friday 星期五之后
short_description: After Friday is a psychological horror game. Every late Friday night on your way home, you sense that someone—or something—is following you. At the same time, your memories begin to fade—perhaps they were never important to begin with.
detailed_description:
"After Friday" is a psychological horror game where tension builds through atmosphere and exploration rather than combat or jump-scares. There are no monsters to fight—just the unsettling feeling that something is off. You’ll find yourself walking through eerie environments, slowly uncovering a deeper secret. It’s a journey into the unknown—or perhaps, into a familiar place.

This game evolved from the Taptap Spotlight Game Jam. After receiving positive feedback and seeing how much people connected with the concept, I decided to develop it into a complete game. It’s been a rewarding journey.

Finally, I truly hope you enjoy playing it, and I hope she is ok.
